targeting._comment: Edit titles/locations as needed. The auto-cycle and React /search both read from here.

resumes._comment: Each base resume is keyed by role family. Drop files into resumes/ and register them here.

tailoring._comment_approvalGate: When true, the executor shows the tailored resume and waits for user OK before proceeding to PDF + submit.

submission._comment_approvalGate: When true (recommended), the executor pauses before clicking Submit. Always true for ATS portals.
submission._comment_autoSubmit: DANGER: when true, the scheduled task will autonomously click Submit on LinkedIn Easy Apply forms (only). LinkedIn ToS prohibits automation; account-ban risk is real. Default false.
submission._comment_autoSubmitEasyApplyOnly: Only auto-submit Easy Apply paths. External ATS portals (Workday, Greenhouse, etc.) ALWAYS stop for human Submit, regardless of autoSubmit.
submission._comment_dailyMaxAutoSubmissions: Hard cap. Once N auto-submits have happened today, the cycle skips submission for the rest of the day.
submission._comment_perCycleMaxSubmissions: Hard cap per scheduled-task run. 1 means at most one autonomous submission per fire, even if multiple postings qualify.
submission._comment_excludeCompanies: Companies to NEVER auto-submit to. Match is case-insensitive substring on the company field.

email._comment: TBD: choose Gmail or Outlook in Phase 2.
email.scanScope: messages from ATS domains or matching active company/title patterns

notifications._comment: TBD: where to send per-cycle summaries and approval requests.
